0.text: Minimal bronchiectasis in the central portions of both lungs

1.text: Linear atelectases in the lingular segment inferior subsegment of the left upper lobe and in the basal segments of the lower lobe

2.text: Linear atelectasis in the lateral segment of the right middle lobe

3.text: Minimal emphysematous changes in both lungs

4.text: Subcentimeter indeterminate nodule in the apicoposterior segment of the left upper lobe
